protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: total proteins were extracted by suspending the cells in SDS-buffer ... denatured by heating ... analysed on an SDS gel

protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: supernatant obtained from E. coli BL–hyb5–lyb5 by centrifugation after induction was used as the crude Lyb5 extract

protocols.Paper_title: Identification and characterization of the two-component cell lysis cassette encoded by temperate bacteriophage φPYB5 of Lactobacillus fermentum
protocols.Evidence: Bacteria cells were harvested ... washed ... suspended ... and autoclaved as substrates
